title: Method Level 1C — Combination
summary: Mix steps, skips, and varied rhythms from both hands, then bring them together on the grand staff.

exercises.title: C Position Round
exercises.summary: Right hand ascends, skips to G, then steps back down.
exercises.goal: Combine stepwise motion and skips in a single flowing phrase.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Waltz Song
exercises.summary: A six-measure waltz combining steps and skips in 3/4.
exercises.goal: Play a musical waltz with even, flowing beat placement.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: March Song
exercises.summary: A six-measure march mixing steps and thirds in 2/4.
exercises.goal: Play a crisp, rhythmic march with a strong two-beat pulse.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Slow Air
exercises.summary: A lyrical half-note melody mixing halves and quarters.
exercises.goal: Shape a singing tone across mixed note values.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Skip and Rest
exercises.summary: Right hand skips with rests in between — combining skips and silence.
exercises.goal: Count rests precisely within a phrase that includes both steps and skips.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Round
exercises.summary: Left hand ascends, skips to G3, then steps back down.
exercises.goal: Combine steps and skips fluently in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Waltz Song
exercises.summary: Left hand six-measure waltz mixing steps and skips.
exercises.goal: Play a flowing waltz with a clear three-beat feel in bass clef.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass March Song
exercises.summary: Left hand march combining steps and thirds in 2/4.
exercises.goal: Maintain a crisp two-beat pulse in bass clef march style.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Slow Air
exercises.summary: Left hand lyrical melody with half notes and a quarter descent.
exercises.goal: Produce a singing bass-clef tone across mixed note values.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Bass Skip and Rest
exercises.summary: Left hand skips combined with quarter rests.
exercises.goal: Count rests accurately in a bass-clef phrase with skips.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Parallel Steps
exercises.summary: Both hands step up and down together in C position.
exercises.goal: Coordinate both hands moving in the same direction at the same time.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Contrary Motion
exercises.summary: Right hand ascends while left hand descends, then they meet on C.
exercises.goal: Coordinate hands moving in opposite directions.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Both Hands Waltz
exercises.summary: Both hands step together in 3/4 waltz time.
exercises.goal: Keep a shared three-beat pulse with both hands stepping in parallel.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Both Hands March
exercises.summary: Both hands march together in parallel in 2/4.
exercises.goal: Lock both hands onto the same two-beat march pulse.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Melody Over Whole Notes
exercises.summary: Right hand carries a quarter-note melody while left hand sustains whole notes.
exercises.goal: Keep the left-hand whole note steady while the right hand moves independently.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Melody Over Half Notes
exercises.summary: Right hand plays a quarter-note melody above left-hand half notes.
exercises.goal: Sustain left-hand halves independently while the right hand moves.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Call and Response
exercises.summary: Right hand calls with a melody; left hand answers while right rests.
exercises.goal: Understand phrase alternation between hands using rests as cues.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Parallel Thirds
exercises.summary: Both hands skip in thirds together — C–E–G pattern.
exercises.goal: Play the C–E–G skip pattern simultaneously in both hands.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Grand Waltz
exercises.summary: Both hands in a six-measure waltz with independent rhythmic patterns.
exercises.goal: Coordinate independent rhythmic patterns between hands in 3/4.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Combination Capstone
exercises.summary: Grand-staff piece drawing on all Level 1C skills — steps, skips, mixed values, and independent hands.
exercises.goal: Perform a complete grand-staff piece combining all skills from Levels 1A, 1B, and 1C.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
